title: Three people observed a UFO crash in Vilhena-RO [1990]
excerpt: MARCH 24th, 1990. Time: 6:30 pm. Duration: 30 seconds. An “owner of a supermarket in the region of Vilhena, State of Rondônia, reported that he observed in the sky” […], “a strong light (larger than the size of the sun) with a yellowish red color, at great speed, in a straight direction with the horizon […]
text_preview: MARCH 24th, 1990. Time: 6:30 pm. Duration: 30 seconds. An “owner of a supermarket in the region of Vilhena, State of Rondônia, reported that he observed in the sky” […], “a strong light (larger than the size of the sun) with a yellowish red color, at great speed, in a straight direction with the horizon and leaving a trail of smoke that remained in the sky for 1 min after being hit by the ground.” According to the witness, two more people observed the unidentified flying object, which fell approximately 50km from the observers. The reporting witness also stated that the sighting took place in
summary: A supermarket owner and two others witnessed a large yellowish-red light crash ~50km from Vilhena, RO on March 24, 1990, leaving a smoke trail.
